classification_profile.one_line_description: Amazon Selling Partner exposes ecommerce APIs for catalog, orders, customers, and storefront operations.
classification_profile.main_blocker: SP-API access is public on paper but is operationally gated by seller context, app authorization, and Amazon review flows.
classification_profile.notes: Classification is based on public commerce developer docs and typical app-auth patterns.
